summary: UI Repositioning Test - MiraDemoPage header bar implementation verified through code review. All action buttons (Quick Reply Tiles, C° Need help, Insight icon, Picks icon) correctly moved to mp-card-header. Message body is clean with no duplicate buttons. Responsive CSS implemented for 768px, 480px breakpoints. Spell correction 'cake' to 'cat' fix confirmed - fuzzy matching disabled.

elements: Quick Reply Tiles (mp-header-tile) with purple borders
Insight icon (mp-header-insight-icon) - circular purple with count
Picks icon (mp-header-picks-icon) - gift with pet face/paw overlay

test_limitations.membership_required: MiraDemoPage requires membership login to test live UI
test_limitations.routes_tested: /mira (public) uses different MiraPage component without the new header bar

public_mira_page.details: Public /mira page loads and works but uses different MiraPage.jsx component
public_mira_page.note: The header bar changes are in MiraDemoPage.jsx which requires membership

critical_code_review_comments: Header bar implementation is complete and follows flex layout with horizontal scroll on mobile
All elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing (e.g., header-tile-{idx})
CSS uses proper iOS Safari compatibility with -webkit-overflow-scrolling
Help text is correctly hidden on small mobile (480px) to save space
Spell correction fuzzy matching correctly disabled to prevent 'cake' -> 'cat'

test_credentials.note: MiraDemoPage requires membership. Public /mira uses different component.

context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraDemoPage header bar implementation verified through code review. All action buttons correctly moved to mp-card-header. To test live UI, need membership access to /mira-demo or /mira-os routes. The public /mira page uses MiraPage.jsx which has a different UI structure.
